error.signature: ArrowInvalid: Schema mismatch — Parquet files have incompatible schemas

verdict.summary: Reading multiple Parquet files fails because column types differ between files.

dead_ends.action: Force cast all columns to string
dead_ends.why_fails: Casting to string destroys type information and breaks downstream numeric operations

dead_ends.action: Use schema from first file for all files
dead_ends.why_fails: First file schema may be outdated; newer files with added columns will lose data

workarounds.action: Use unify_schemas to create a merged schema
Read with pyarrow dataset API which handles schema evolution natively
workarounds.how: import pyarrow.dataset as ds; dataset = ds.dataset('data/', format='parquet')
